title: Eating Animation - BlockPixel Addon
body:
This resource pack retextures the animations from the [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) mod to match the [BlockPixel](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/blockpixel) resource pack.

Based on the [Eating Animation - Classic Bare Bones Addon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-eating-animation).
